ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" INTEGER /* Type of the tournament (foreign key to tournament_types) */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Location of the tournament (foreign key to locations) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "total_prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the tournament */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee for the tournament */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Total number of players registered for the tournament */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tournament */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament organizer */,
  "blinds_schedule" TEXT /* Blinds schedule for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_tournament_type FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_type") REFERENCES tournament_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the player */,
  "player_type" TEXT /* Type of player (e.g., professional, amateur) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Overall ranking of the player */,
  "total_earnings" REAL /* Total amount of money earned by the player across all tournaments */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tournament_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-tournament record */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month and year of the tournament */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the player in the tournament */,
  "initial_chips" REAL /* Initial chip count of the player */,
  "total_hands" INTEGER /* Total number of hands played by the player */,
  "total_refills" INTEGER /* Total number of refills (buy-ins) made by the player */,
  "total_busts" INTEGER /* Total number of busts (eliminations) for the player */,
  "best_hand" TEXT /* Best hand result for the player */,
  "worst_hand" TEXT /* Worst hand result for the player */,
  "hand_average" REAL /* Average hand performance of the player */,
  "max_chips" TEXT /* Maximum chip count achieved by the player */,
  "final_chips" REAL /* Chip count at the end of the tournament */,
  "total_earnings" REAL /* Total amount of money earned by the player in the tournament */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the player in the tournament */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the player's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_records_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_records_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hands" (
  "hand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hand */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player-tournament record */,
  "hand_number" INTEGER /* Number of the hand in the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "hand_result" INTEGER /* Result of the hand (foreign key to hand_results) */,
  "chips_at_start" REAL /* Chip count at the start of the hand */,
  "chips_at_end" REAL /* Chip count at the end of the hand */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount bet by the player in the hand */,
  "winning_amount" REAL /* Amount won by the player in the hand */,
  "hand_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the hand in minutes */,
  "hand_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the hand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hands_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES player_tournament_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hands_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hands_hand_result FOREIGN KEY ("hand_result") REFERENCES hand_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refills" (
  "refill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refill */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player-tournament record */,
  "refill_number" INTEGER /* Number of the refill for the player */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "refill_amount" REAL /* Amount of the refill */,
  "refill_time" TEXT /* Time the refill was made */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the refill */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the refill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refills_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES player_tournament_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refills_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "busts" (
  "bust_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bust */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player-tournament record */,
  "bust_number" INTEGER /* Number of the bust for the player */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "bust_time" TEXT /* Time the player was eliminated */,
  "bust_position" INTEGER /* Position in which the player was eliminated */,
  "bust_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the bust */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bust_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_busts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_busts_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES player_tournament_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hand_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hand result */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the hand result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hand result */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Numerical score associated with the hand result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tournament staff, player, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tournament type */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in the tournament type */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players required to start the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organizer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the organizer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the organizer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the organizer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the organizer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)
